overview_zh: 本期从 181 个结构化来源中生成，候选 144 条，跨期排除历史已展示 122 条，入选 18 条。所有条目均保留原始来源链接；若真实抓取不足，则仅发布未展示过的来源索引记录，不用测试数据冒充更新。
overview_en: This brief is generated from 181 structured sources with 144 candidates, 122 previously displayed items excluded, and 18 selected items. Every item keeps an original source link; if live fetching is insufficient, the site publishes only not-yet-shown source-index records instead of fake news.

items.title: MUFG aims to become AI-native with OpenAI
items.summary_zh: 重点：MUFG uses ChatGPT Enterprise to build an AI-native organization, improve workflows, and deliver new AI-powered financial services at scale.
items.summary_en: Focus: MUFG uses ChatGPT Enterprise to build an AI-native organization, improve workflows, and deliver new AI-powered financial services at scale.

items.summary_en: Focus: NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Ultra is offering leading performance at lower cost than top closed models with the largest and most widely adopted AI agent orchestration platform. items.title: Our approach to government and national security partnerships
items.summary_zh: 重点：Learn how OpenAI approaches government and national security partnerships, with principles for responsible AI use, democratic accountability, and public safety.
items.summary_en: Focus: Learn how OpenAI approaches government and national security partnerships, with principles for responsible AI use, democratic accountability, and public safety.

items.title: Separating signal from noise in coding evaluations
items.summary_zh: 重点：A new analysis from OpenAI reveals issues in SWE-Bench Pro, a popular coding benchmark, raising concerns about reliability and accuracy in evaluating AI models.
items.summary_en: Focus: A new analysis from OpenAI reveals issues in SWE-Bench Pro, a popular coding benchmark, raising concerns about reliability and accuracy in evaluating AI models.

items.title: Helping K–12 educators build practical AI skills
items.summary_zh: 重点：OpenAI Academy and the Walton Family Foundation are bringing hands-on AI Skills Jams to help K–12 educators build practical AI skills for the classroom.
items.summary_en: Focus: OpenAI Academy and the Walton Family Foundation are bringing hands-on AI Skills Jams to help K–12 educators build practical AI skills for the classroom.

items.title: Introducing GPT-Live
items.summary_zh: 重点：A new generation of voice models for natural human-AI interaction, now powering ChatGPT Voice.

items.title: Why AI Infrastructure must evolve for Agent Experience — Akshat Bubna, Modal CTO
items.summary_zh: 重点：2 years after our first coverage, we return with Modal's other cofounder to explore why Agent Experience is working now, and everything they have learned building the new agent cloud.
items.summary_en: Focus: 2 years after our first coverage, we return with Modal's other cofounder to explore why Agent Experience is working now, and everything they have learned building the new agent cloud.

items.title: Grok 4.5 now available on AI Gateway

items.title: Open, convenient and predictable: Introducing Provisioned Throughput
items.summary_zh: 重点：Provisioned Throughput gives you reserved inference capacity for frontier open models like MiniMax M3 and GLM-5.2. Token-based pricing, a 99% uptime SLA, and up to 90% lower cost than proprietary APIs. No GPU-hour math, no infrastructure to manage.
items.summary_en: Focus: Provisioned Throughput gives you reserved inference capacity for frontier open models like MiniMax M3 and GLM-5.2. Token-based pricing, a 99% uptime SLA, and up to 90% lower cost than proprietary APIs. No GPU-hour math, no infrastructure to manage.
